content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be optimized by dynamically pruning and prioritizing stored episodic memories based on the intrinsic curiosity signals generated by ICM/RND curiosity-driven reinforcement learning frameworks. This creates a self-reinforcing loop where high-curiosity, information-dense memories are retained to improve future active learning sampling, while low-value irrelevant memories are discarded to avoid memory bloat.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
